events.appearance_notes: High activity; The two of them took their things and walked to the trunk of the white car to load them.
events.event_text: From 3.7s to 14.9s, the two of them took their things and walked to the trunk of the white car to load them.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A car drove up on the road and several men got out and took away the two people behind the white car.
events.event_text: From 18.9s to 30.5s, a car drove up on the road and several men got out and took away the two people behind the white car.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Several men suddenly rushed out of the door, and a naked man with a gun chased out from behind.
events.event_text: From 32.8s to 41.8s, several men suddenly rushed out of the door, and a naked man with a gun chased out from behind.
